final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: fantasy-illustration
Asset type: epic fantasy battle scene, wide cinematic composition
Primary request: a dragon breathing fire locked in combat with a knight charging with a shield, set against a burning castle and lightning-filled sky
Scene/backdrop: medieval castle engulfed in flames, stormy sky with dramatic lightning strikes, ash and embers in the air
Subject: a massive dragon exhaling a torrent of fire toward a heavily armored knight; knight in full plate armor charging forward with a large shield raised, dynamic forward momentum
Style/medium: fantasy digital illustration, painterly epic style
Composition/framing: wide-angle dynamic composition, low-angle perspective emphasizing scale, strong diagonal lines conveying motion and tension
Lighting/mood: dramatic mixed lighting — fierce orange fire glow from dragon breath and burning castle, cold blue-white lightning flashes, high contrast, epic and intense atmosphere
Color palette: deep crimson and orange fire tones, stormy dark blue-grey sky, silver armor highlights, charred black ruins
Materials/textures: scaled dragon hide with iridescent sheen, battle-worn plate armor with dents and scratches, stone castle walls crumbling in flames
Constraints: dragon and knight must both be clearly visible and in active combat poses; fire breath must connect the two figures dramatically
Avoid: static poses, cartoonish proportions, flat lighting, watermark
